title: 先取り大人のクリスマス！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while working in my office during the
holiday season...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? You don't get presents from Santa
anymore, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thought so. That's a shame, though. You'd be on
the good list for sure.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But don't worry. I was thinking this year I'll be your Santa and get you a nice present!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So you just look forward to the big day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the eve of the "big day" arrives. I follow
Oguri Cap's instructions and make my way to the
meeting place.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays. Let's have a great day together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Mayano said that if I'm going out for the
holidays, I should wear something extra special.
And she told me all about what grown-ups do.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And how the most important present is the
memories you make together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So, today, just leave everything to me, because I
want to give you the best present of all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that Mayano Top Gun had a hand in this
is... concerning... but I know Oguri Cap's just
excited for the holiday and presents, so I'm sure
it'll be a fun day.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: We'll have all of whatever you recommend.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Okay... Coming right up...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Now we're set. So, what do you think, Trainer?
Your heart must be pounding!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Mayano said I should try and get your heart
pounding. So, this is the idea I came up with.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If you let the staff choose your order, there's no
telling what they'll bring. Exciting, right?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hamburger steak, curry, omelet rice... Maybe even gratin or spaghetti... Who knows what's on the way? Ahh, but I can't wait to find out... Drool...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Take a look. It's the Winter Crab Fair. And every
single one of them looks gorgeous and delicious.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Of course I like crab, but more importantly,
Mayano said we should go window shopping and
enjoy something seasonal.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: This time of year is crab season, right?
choice_data_list:
Can't argue with that. Some crab hot pot would
really hit the spot right now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... That would be amazing right now. But
we're supposed to be window shopping. Mayano
didn't say anything in her advice about
purchasing stuff.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yep... Juust looking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I continue on Oguri's one-of-a-kind
guided tour through a few more places. Before I
know it, the sun has set.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, the illuminations are all lit up. Now it really feels festive!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right, shall we head over?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There's one last thing I want to show you. Come
on.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay, we're here!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: We're going to look at the stars together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Aren't they pretty? It's true the stars really
do come out brighter in winter.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I learned in my hometown that you can see the
stars best this time of year.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And... the ones you can see here kind of look the
same as the ones back home. It makes me feel at
ease...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... um, how was it? Did you have fun today?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's great! So I guess my light-bulb moment was
correct.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're a grown-up, so you don't get presents
from Santa, right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was trying to figure out if there was anything I
could do for you. And that's when Mayano told
me that grown-ups have their own way of
celebrating the holiday.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
She said they spend the day with someone really
close to them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's when I had my light-bulb moment. I realized we're close, so maybe you'd want to spend the day with me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm glad I got it right! I really hope today was
a nice present for you...
choice_data_list: Today was the best present I could ask for.

Are you sure, though? What if Santa mistakes
you for a grown up?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...! Y-you mean... Even better than a present from
Santa?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I wasn't expecting my present to be... that
good. It makes me feel... pretty honored.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay! In that case, I'll take over for Santa from
now, and all your presents will come from me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So, you better get excited for it each and every
December!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Since I celebrated like a grown-up this
year... he might...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's not how it looks, Santa! Today was Trainer's
present!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... That should probably have it settled, but
just in case, I'm going to write a letter and keep it
next to my bed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Oguri Cap drops by with a huge
smile on her face and tells me she got exactly the
present she asked for in her letter.
